claim: High-entropy pressure smoothing is a diagnostic lens and should remain bounded/graded rather than turning into pressure control.
The entropy threshold handoff is observable as a soft review band, so the reported 0.70 edge is not only a hard opaque switch.
authority: read-only diagnostic; no smoothing threshold changed

claim: The 90s high-entropy reciprocity window can expire and report stale after a 91s gap, keeping ghost connection risk visible.
authority: read-only reciprocity evidence; no bridge stale-window or protocol behavior changed

claim: Raising `PRESSURE_TREND_SMOOTHING_HIGH_ENTROPY_AT` to 0.75 would alter live-consumed pressure interpretation and needs V2 lifecycle approval before deployment.
authority: Tier 4/5 pressure-smoothing/live bridge interpretation candidate; boundary packet required before approval
